Corset.name: Corset
Corset.description: A reinforced corset used by female fighters.

Tanktop.name: Tanktop
Tanktop.description: A light, sleeveless shirt to show off the muscles.

Uniform.name: Uniform
Uniform.description: The uniform of a certain institution of magical learning.

Old Rags.name: Old Rags
Old Rags.description: Tattered strips of cloth barely holding together.

Old Armor.name: Old Armor
Old Armor.description: Dented and rusted armor that has seen better days.

Traveler's Tunic.name: Traveler's Tunic
Traveler's Tunic.description: A sturdy tunic made for long journeys. Light and practical.

Dress.name: Dress
Dress.description: An elegant dress that conceals a thin layer of protective lining.

Cult Robes.name: Cult Robes
Cult Robes.description: Ceremonial robes worn by members of a shadowy order.

Mage's Robe.name: Mage's Robe
Mage's Robe.description: A flowing robe woven with mana-conducting thread.

Necromancer Robes.name: Necromancer Robes
Necromancer Robes.description: Dark robes imbued with the residue of death magic.

Whitewing Armor.name: Whitewing Armor
Whitewing Armor.description: Lightweight armor worn by Pegasus Knights. Allows freedom of movement.

Chainmail.name: Chainmail
Chainmail.description: Interlocking iron rings offering solid all-around protection.

Lizal Armor.name: Lizal Armor
Lizal Armor.description: Armor fashioned from the thick scales of a Lizardman.

Scale Mail.name: Scale Mail
Scale Mail.description: Overlapping metal scales riveted onto a leather backing.

Arcward Armor.name: Arcward Armor
Arcward Armor.description: Heavy armor etched with sigils that deflect magical attacks.

Adventure Clothes.name: Adventure Clothes
Adventure Clothes.description: Reinforced clothing favored by treasure hunters. Built for speed and survival.

Wizard Robe.name: Wizard Robe
Wizard Robe.description: An ancient robe that greatly amplifies the wearer's magical power.

Archmage Robe.name: Archmage Robe
Archmage Robe.description: The ultimate mage's garment, said to have been worn by the Arcmat sages.
